name: Summarize meeting notes with Google Drive and Microsoft Teams end to end

parameters.text: =тЬЕ Summarize meeting notes with Google Drive and Microsoft Teams end to e тАФ run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf05623-draft`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Keep Valid Drafts

### Keep Valid Drafts

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

Next: Detect Sentiment

### Detect Sentiment

Scores the text's sentiment; ports fire positive / neutral / negative.

Ports: тСатЖТ Escalate Negative тАФ Slack ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Log Neutral Feedback, Capture Failure Context ┬╖ тСвтЖТ Thank the Sender

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### OpenRouter Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Detect Sentiment** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС OpenRouter API key

### Escalate Negative тАФ Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#content`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Log Neutral Feedback

Appends a new row to 'Draft Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Thank the Sender

Sends a Microsoft Teams notification via the connected account.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Microsoft OAuth2

### Collect All Outcomes

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Fingerprint for Idempotency

### Fingerprint for Idempotency

Custom JavaScript: Build a stable idempotency key per draft (djb2 hash, no deps)

Next: Drop Already-Processed Items

### Drop Already-Processed Items

Cross-execution dedupe: remembers keys it has processed before and drops repeats тАФ the idempotency guard.

Next: Load Previous Snapshot

### Load Previous Snapshot

Reads every row from 'Draft Tracker' тАФ the read side of the store, e.g. for a digest or a downstream sync.

Ports: тСатЖТ Compute Drift vs Snapshot ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Compute Drift vs Snapshot

Custom JavaScript: Compare current metrics with the previous snapshot

Next: Serialize Run Output (CSV)

### Serialize Run Output (CSV)

Serializes items to a CSV binary file.

Next: Archive Copy to Google Drive

### Archive Copy to Google Drive

Uploads the generated file to Google Drive as a timestamped archive copy.

Ports: тСатЖТ Stamp Completion Time ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2

nodes.name: Note: Archive Copy to Google Drive

parameters.content:
### Stamp Completion Time

Stamps `completedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Persist Run Metadata

### Persist Run Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record тАФ searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

Appends a new row to 'Draft Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Send Summary to Slack ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#content`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Microsoft Teams

### Escalate Failure to Microsoft Teams

Posts a chat message into a Microsoft Teams channel тАФ same role as a Slack notify, for teams standardized on Teams.

Next: Park in Dead-Letter Queue

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Microsoft OAuth2

### Park in Dead-Letter Queue

Appends a new row to 'Draft Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

# Summarize meeting notes with Google Drive and Microsoft Teams end to end

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route ┬╖ **Level:** Production ┬╖ **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Summarize meeting notes with Google Drive and Microsoft Teams end to end. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual captions is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook тЖТ Keep Valid Drafts тЖТ Detect Sentiment тЖТ Escalate Negative тАФ Slack тЖТ Collect All Outcomes тЖТ Fingerprint for Idempotency тЖТ Drop Already-Processed Items тЖТ тАж

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating captions in content creation
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Improves response time
- Scales without extra headcount

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account; Microsoft OAuth2; OpenRouter API key; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger тАФ hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click тЖТ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

A three-way branch on sentiment, not a single IF, because 'neutral' deserves different handling than 'negative' тАФ quietly logging positive feedback while paging a human only for genuine complaints keeps the alert channel's signal-to-noise ratio high for whoever is on the other end.

## Practice exercises

Already production-grade тАФ deepen your understanding:

1. Add a logging step to the neutral branch too and compare its volume against the negative branch.
2. Test borderline phrases through the sentiment node to see where the positive/neutral line actually falls.
3. Add a 4th branch for a specific emotion if your sentiment provider supports finer-grained labels.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯФР Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials тАФ never in node parameters.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your captions process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.
